title: ageratina hederifolia
intro: Ageratina hederifolia, also known as Mexican coffee plant or coffee pipe weed, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include relieving digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Ageratina hederifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
